level_signals: Extensive experience in product management required
Track record of leading products from ideation through launch and iteration
Expected to serve as trusted strategic advisor to customers
End-to-end ownership across full product lifecycle

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Extensive experience in product management, with a track record of leading products from ideation through launch and iteration.

Comfort working deeply with engineering on technical systems and tradeoffs. Experience building or shipping developer-facing or highly technical products (e.g. APIs, SDKs, products serving developers), and the ability to engage credibly in architectural and implementation discussions.
Passion for deeply understanding user needs and identifying the right solutions from first principles. Ability to operate in high ambiguity and drive new 0→1 product bets.
Proven ability to partner closely with engineering, design, customers, and leadership to turn complex ideas into shipped products.
Excellent written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to explain complex technical and product concepts to a wide range of stakeholders.
Embodies our values and contributes positively to our culture.
Thrives in a fast-paced startup environment, adapts quickly to changing priorities, and navigates ambiguity with confidence.

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Experience building AI-driven products, especially conversational or agentic systems.
Hands-on experience writing production code (e.g. TypeScript, React, or similar), or prior experience as a software engineer.

scope.surface: Agent SDK — developer-facing platform for building and extending AI agents
primary_metrics_inferred: Speed and quality of product launches
core_responsibilities: Bring Enterprise-grade AI Agents to the World
Solve for multiple stakeholders: consumers, CX managers, and developers
Innovate on new tools and processes for building agents
Partner closely with engineering, design, leadership, and the entire company
Become a trusted and strategic advisor to customers
Lead the product through all stages from concept to excellent execution

compensation.equity_form: Eligible full-time employees can participate in Sierra's equity plans subject to the terms of the applicable plans and policies.

green_flags: Prominent co-founders (Bret Taylor, Clay Bavor) with strong industry credibility
Clear product surface: Agent SDK for developer ecosystem
Encourages applicants even if experience doesn't precisely match the job description
Generous benefits package including parental leave, fertility benefits, and flexible PTO
Explicit DEI commitment in job posting
red_flags: In-person company primarily based in San Francisco — no remote option stated, limiting candidate pool
Years of experience not specified, making seniority expectations opaque

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from 'extensive experience' language and scope of responsibilities; no explicit level stated)
scope.business_model (inferred from product description and enterprise focus)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (not stated in JD; inferred from responsibilities)
location.office_time_required (inferred from 'primarily an in-person company' language; no explicit percentage given)
ambiguities: Years of experience required: JD says 'extensive experience' but provides no numeric minimum. Severity set to hard but years_required_min left null.
Visa sponsorship: not mentioned anywhere in the JD; marked 'unclear'.
Remote eligibility: JD says 'primarily an in-person company based in San Francisco' but does not explicitly prohibit remote for this role. Treated as onsite given primary-in-person language.
